# Fictionist Manuscript — Tier 2 Power Tools

> **For Hermes:** Use `delegate_task` to implement this plan task-by-task.

**Goal:** Elevate Fictionist from "polished editor" to "professional authoring platform" — templates, writing goals, global search & replace, corkboard (Scrivener/Ulysses-grade).

**Architecture:** Presentation-only except session goals provider. No domain changes.

---

## Task 1: Writing Templates

**What:** User picks a template (Novel, Screenplay, D&D Campaign, etc.) and chapters are auto-generated.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/widget/template_picker.dart`
- Modify: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/screen/manuscript_screen.dart`

**Templates:**
- Novel: Prologue → Act 1 (3 ch) → Act 2 (5 ch) → Act 3 (3 ch) → Epilogue
- Short Story: Opening → Rising Action → Climax → Resolution
- Screenplay: Teaser → Act 1 → Act 2A → Midpoint → Act 2B → Act 3 → Tag
- D&D Campaign: Intro → Quest Hooks (3) → Encounters (3) → Boss → Aftermath
- Blank: Single untitled chapter

---

## Task 2: Session Writing Goals + Streak

**What:** Set daily word goal. Editor tracks today's words. Shows 🔥 streak.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/provider/session_goals_provider.dart`
- Modify: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/widget/writing_stats_bar.dart`

---

## Task 3: Global Search & Replace

**What:** Ctrl+F across all chapters. Preview matches with context. Replace one or all.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/widget/global_search_sheet.dart`
- Modify: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/screen/manuscript_screen.dart`

---

## Task 4: Corkboard View

**What:** Visual grid of chapter cards. Drag reorder. Card shows title, word count, synopsis.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/widget/corkboard_view.dart`
- Modify: `lib/presentation/features/manuscript/screen/manuscript_screen.dart`

---

## Summary

| # | Feature | New Files | Modified |
|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | Templates | 1 | 1 |
| T2 | Session goals | 1 | 1 |
| T3 | Search & replace | 1 | 1 |
| T4 | Corkboard | 1 | 1 |

**~600 lines, zero domain changes.**
